name: vectro_compression
description: Gate: INT8 compression_ratio >= 4.0, mean_cosine_similarity >= 0.9999 (from vectro_bridge live validation 2026-03-26).
notes: Run via: python -m pytest tests/unit/test_vectro_bridge.py -k benchmark. INT8 is the production baseline. NF4 target: mean_cosine_similarity >= 0.98. PQ-96 target: recall@10 >= 0.95.
